title: Furaya Hotel - Front Desk Module & Hotel Management System
description: Developed a full-stack hotel management system using Laravel, React, and Inertia.js that migrated complex manual workflows into a secure, role-based application validated through extensive performance and usability testing.

title: KLC Rooms - IDN Ministry of Finance Unit Room Management System
description: Modernized the Ministry of Finance's facility management by replacing a legacy PHP system with a scalable Next.js and TypeScript platform, delivering a secure and intuitive booking experience across multiple organizational units.

title: Yaman Music Audio Classification System
description: Developed a full-stack deep learning solution using Next.js and Flask that automates the classification of traditional Yaman music with 93.84% accuracy, streamlining cultural heritage preservation through real-time audio analysis.

title: MassBeat - Workout App and Trainer Consultation
description: Designed a comprehensive high-fidelity prototype for a unified home workout platform using Figma, applying Design Thinking to consolidate fragmented fitness tools into a consistent, user-centered ecosystem.

title: Ekolog App - Natural Disaster Reporting App
description: Developed Ekolog App, a mobile-first disaster reporting platform that integrates Firebase and a Python K-Means clustering model to automate severity classification and promote environmental awareness in support of SDG 15.

title: Indogrosir Supply Chain System Case Study
description: Optimized supply chain operations by building an integrated ASP.NET MVC platform that automates inventory restocking via threshold-based draft orders, while simultaneously delivering a responsive public website for improved brand accessibility.

title: Rotte Bakery Supply Chain System Case Study
description: Developed a comprehensive MERN stack supply chain platform that automates inventory logistics using Bill of Materials (BoM) and Reorder Point (ROP) logic while empowering operational planning through interactive sales forecasting dashboards.

title: Web Identification of Rice Types based on Color
description: Built a web-based image classification tool using Python and Deep Learning that identifies rice varieties based on color, utilizing a custom-curated training dataset to ensure accurate predictions.
